If you need a broken garage door spring replaced **today in Pleasanton** , these companies explicitly advertise same-day spring repair/service in the Pleasanton/Tri-Valley area:

  * Valiant Garage Door — Pleasanton-based company that states common spring sizes are stocked and spring replacement can often be completed the same day, subject to schedule and parts availability. [Valiant Garage Door | Same-Day Repair, Springs & Openers](https://www.valiantdoor.com/?utm_source=chatgpt.com)

  * Precision Garage Door Service — Advertises same-day repairs in Pleasanton, including broken torsion spring replacement, with appointments available seven days a week. [Garage Door Repair in Pleasanton, CA | Precision Garage Doors](https://precisiondooreastbay.com/pleasanton?utm_source=chatgpt.com)

  * Same Day Garage Door Repair — Offers same-day and emergency garage door service throughout the Bay Area, including Pleasanton. [Same Day Garage Door Repair — 24/7 Bay Area Service](https://www.samedaygd.com/?utm_source=chatgpt.com)

  * Door King — Local Pleasanton garage door service company with extended hours and emergency availability. [Door King | Expert Garage Door Services in Pleasanton, CA](https://www.rollupdoorssales.com/?utm_source=chatgpt.com)

A few quick tips before booking:

  * If you heard a loud bang and the door suddenly became very heavy, it's often a broken torsion spring. Avoid operating the door until it's repaired. [Garage Door Repair in Pleasanton, CA | Precision Garage Doors](https://precisiondooreastbay.com/pleasanton?utm_source=chatgpt.com)

  * Ask whether they stock the correct spring size for your door and whether they can complete the repair on the first visit.

  * Typical professional spring replacement is often in the low hundreds of dollars, though pricing varies by spring type and door size. [Garage Door Repair in Pleasanton, CA | Precision Garage Doors](https://precisiondooreastbay.com/pleasanton?utm_source=chatgpt.com)

If you want, I can also help you compare quotes or estimate what a fair price should be based on your garage door size and spring type.
